title: NSR-AI
description: Gemini + ChatGPT Powered AI Chat for Minecraft: Fast, Smart & Server-Friendly
body:
#
⚡︎ New Server Runtime вЂ“ Artificial Intelligence ⚡︎
вЂњThe AI Layer for Minecraft Servers.вЂќ
--- **вњ” Multi-API** вЂў **вњ” RAG Knowledge** вЂў **вњ” Simple & Powerful** вЂў **вњ” Highly Customizable** вЂў **вњ” Minimal Lag** **MC Versions:** 1.16 вЂ“ 1.21.11 вЂў **JAR Size:** 3.5 MB вЂў **AI Models:** Gemini, Claude, OpenAI вЂў **Highly Optimized** --- ## 🌐︎ What is NSR-AI? NSR-AI (New Server Runtime вЂ“ Artificial Intelligence) is a high-performance AI middleware designed to bridge the gap between advanced Large Language Models and the Minecraft server environment. It is more than a simple chat tool; it is an intelligent ecosystem that weaves AI into the very fabric of your worldвЂ”from automated staff support to emotionally intelligent companions. ## 🚀︎ Why Choose NSR-AI - **Multi-API Sovereignty** вЂ” You are never locked into one provider. Switch between `Gemini`, `Claude`, and `OpenAI` in real-time. - **Uncompromising Security** вЂ” With our `Triple-Layer Encryption`, your API keys are mathematically locked to your server and player UUIDs. - **High-Performance Intelligence** вЂ” Built on an entirely `Asynchronous Pipeline`, NSR-AI has `very minimal impact` on your server's TPS. - **Adaptive Narrative Memory** вЂ” Through `Memory Distillation`, your AI remembers your history, your serverвЂ™s lore, and your players' names. ## 🛠︎ The Hybrid Intelligence Engine NSR-AI serves as a multi-role digital infrastructure for your server: 1. **24/7 Intelligent Support Agent:** Uses **RAG (Retrieval Augmented Generation)** to provide exact answers from your `Knowledge Base`, acting as a perfect staff assistant. 2. **Emotional Gameplay Companion:** Powering the **Pet Emotional System** with unique moods (`HAPPY`, `FURIOUS`, `TIRED`), bond levels, and unique relationships. 3. **Dynamic Content Generator:** Generates immersive lore-friendly quest descriptions and dialogue that adapt to each player's specific journey. 4. **Privacy-First Player Utility:** Allows players to bring their own keys, manage private "checkpoints," and control their own AI environment. 5. **Zero-Stall Middleware:** Handles complex AI logic in the background, keeping the server's heartbeat at a perfect 20.0 TPS. 6. **Extensible Developer Framework:** A foundation for growth with a robust **[Open-Source Addon API](https://github.com/BlackForgeOfficial/NSR-AI)** via the `/aia` command portal. ## 🛡︎ Technical Deep Dives - **Zero-Knowledge Security Standard:** Uses three-layer authenticated encryption (`AES-256-GCM`). Even if your files are stolen, your API keys remain unreadable to anyone else. - **Context-Aware Memory Distillation:** Instead of forgetting, the AI "writes a diary" of your conversation. It summarizes history into a single memory message to keep context alive for thousands of messages. - **Staff-Free Knowledge Logic (RAG):** Turn your `knowledge.yml` into a living database. The system extracts the "intent" of questions to provide the AI with factual "Cheat Sheets," preventing hallucinations. - **Self-Healing Infrastructure:** An automated background system monitors for bugs and applies security patches silently. If one AI provider fails, the system can automatically cycle to a fallback provider. --- ## ⚙︎ Core Capabilities - **Zero-Lag Asynchronous AI Engine** вЂ” Completely decoupled from the Minecraft main thread, NSR-AI 1.4 ensures your server maintains 20 TPS even during heavy AI processing. - **Privacy & Anonymization Layer** вЂ” A robust, opt-in privacy system (`/ai opt in`) that masks player names and IPs before they reach external AI providers. - **Developer Middleware & Interceptors** вЂ” Advanced API allowing addons to intercept and modify player input or AI responses in real-time. - **Multi-API Integration & Provider Detection** вЂ” Seamlessly switch between `Gemini`, `Claude`, and `OpenAI`. The system features `Automatic Provider Detection` for a zero-config setup. - **Smooth API Key Rotation & Load Balancing** вЂ” Cycle through up to `20 keys` automatically. If a key hits a rate limit, the system intelligently falls back to the next key for zero downtime. - **Triple-Layer Security Architecture** вЂ” API keys are protected by `AES-256-GCM` encryption across the `Server Master Key`, the `Player Master Key`, and the `Project Key`. - **Advanced Knowledge System (RAG)** вЂ” Uses `Retrieval Augmented Generation` and `Hybrid Intent Recognition` to find precise answers from your lore and facts. - **AI Pet Emotional System** вЂ” Tame and link pets with unique personalities, moods, and inventories. Includes a secure system to share pet access with friends. - **Advanced Memory & Context Awareness** вЂ” Features AI-powered `Summarization` and real-time `Context Tracking` to keep conversations coherent without lag. - **Master Chat Management** вЂ” Take complete control of your dialogue history. Save, resume, or delete conversations using `/ai chat` with `Asynchronous Persistent Logging`. - **Professional Admin Mode** вЂ” Access advanced management tools through a secure code. Deactivate instantly by `sneaking` in-game or using the dedicated command. - **Automatic Configuration Encryption** вЂ” Any plain-text keys added to `config.yml` are automatically encrypted the moment the plugin reloads, preventing plain-text leaks. - **User-Friendly Error Handling** вЂ” Receive clear error messages with actionable solutions (e.g., `Invalid Model - Suggestion: Use a valid model name`) to fix issues instantly. - **Proactive Maintenance & Auto-Fixer** вЂ” An automated system that monitors, downloads, and applies critical `Security Patches` and `Bug Fixes` to keep your server stable. - **Unified Add-on System (/aia)** вЂ” A standardized modular framework where every extension like `Player Stats` or `AFK Tracker` is managed through the `/aia` command portal. - **Sleek UI/UX & AI Awareness** вЂ” A professional `Cyber-Console` interface with interactive `[Stop]`, `[Edit]`, and `[Regenerate]` buttons and animated status indicators. ## рџљЂ What's New in 1.4 - **Asynchronous High Performance** вљЎ вЂ” NSR-AI 1.4 completely decouples the AI engine from the Minecraft main thread. `askAI` and `sendMsg` now run entirely in the background, keeping your server at 20 TPS even during complex AI reasoning. - **Privacy & Anonymization (Opt-In)** рџ›ЎпёЏ вЂ” A robust privacy layer allows players to use `/ai opt in` to anonymize sensitive data (Names, IPs) before sending it to AI providers. This mode also blocks all addon access to player chat for maximum security. - **Chat Interception System (Middleware)** рџ”Њ вЂ” A powerful new Interceptor API allows addons to read, edit, or cancel player inputs and AI responses in real-time, enabling advanced branding and content filtering. - **Universal Command Routing (`/aia`)** рџ“¦ вЂ” Addon commands are now cleanly routed via `/aia `, featuring deep tab completion and a dedicated namespace to prevent command collisions. - **Developer API 3.0-pre** рџ› пёЏ вЂ” A modern builder-pattern API with `CompletableFuture` support, granular RAG (Knowledge Base) access, and dynamic provider/model overrides per-request. - **Stability Hardening & Optimization** рџ’Ћ вЂ” Resolved several critical bugs including addon memory leaks, API key exposure in logs, and pet system logic errors. Massive RAM reduction through inventory stripping and lazy-loading. --- ## 🚀︎ How to Setup 1. **Download:** Get the latest stable version of NSR-AI. 2. **Install:** Place the downloaded `.jar` file into your server's `/plugins` folder. 3. **Configure:** Start your server once to generate the files. Then, open `config.yml` located in the `/plugins/NSR-AI/` folder and add your API key to the `api-keys` list. 4. **Reload & Go:** Start or reload your server. You're all set! --- ## рџ“є Latest Feature Overview

рџ“ЅпёЏ View Other Version Videos

--- ## 📜︎ Commands ### Admin Commands ``` /ai admin вЂ” Toggle admin mode for advanced features. /ai admincode вЂ” View your private activation code (Requires OP). /ai data all вЂ” Display all entries stored in the knowledge base. /ai add , вЂ” Add a new entry (Requires confirmation). /ai remove вЂ” Remove a specific entry from the knowledge base. /ai reload [f|features|nsr-ai|k|knowledge|c|config] вЂ” Reload specific plugin components. /ai cache вЂ” Manage session history for other players. /ai memory вЂ” Manage conversation memory for other players. /aia addon вЂ” List all installed addons and their status (Active/Banned/Error). /aia addon [addon_name] вЂ” View version, author, and description for an addon. ``` ### General Commands ``` /ai вЂ” Start or continue a conversation with the AI. /ai data вЂ” Search the server-specific knowledge base for answers. /ai settings вЂ” Open the interactive GUI to toggle Auto-Summary and change Context. /ai version or /ai v вЂ” Check the current plugin version and update status. /ai help вЂ” Display the dynamic help menu based on your permissions. /ai shop вЂ” Query the economy shop for specific item pricing. /ai cache вЂ” Clear or refresh your own conversation session. /ai memory вЂ” Summarize and manage your own AI memory. /ai confirm вЂ” Confirm a pending knowledge base action. /ai opt вЂ” Toggle privacy mode (Anonymize names/IPs & block addons). /ai disable вЂ” Instantly deactivate your admin mode session. ``` ### API Key Management ``` /ai apikey вЂ” Display the setup guide for session and stored keys. /ai apikey list вЂ” List all your active session and permanent stored keys. /ai apikey store вЂ” Permanently store your last session key with an ID. /ai apikey info [all|key-id] вЂ” View usage stats, errors, and fallback history. /ai apikey model вЂ” Update the AI model for a specific key. /ai apikey clear [all|key-id] вЂ” Delete specific keys or wipe your entire key list. /ai apikey fallback global вЂ” Toggle fallback to server keys on failure. /ai apikey timer remove вЂ” Reset the "Overloaded" status for a key. /ai apikey msg save вЂ” Toggle logging of chats for your active key. /ai apikey context вЂ” Set token limit (e.g., 500, 32k, 128k). /ai apikey autosummary вЂ” Toggle auto-summarization per key. /ai apikey autosummary limit <%> вЂ” Set memory threshold for summary. ``` ### Chat Management ``` /ai chat save вЂ” Save your current conversation history. /ai chat list вЂ” List all your saved conversation names. /ai chat list [chat-name] вЂ” View all saved checkpoints for a specific conversation. /ai chat resume [checkpoint#] вЂ” Load a conversation at a checkpoint. /ai chat delete вЂ” Permanently delete an entire saved conversation. /ai chat delete [checkpoint#|all] вЂ” Delete specific or all checkpoints. ``` ### AI Pet System ``` /ai pet вЂ” View information and stats for your currently active pet. /ai pet tame вЂ” Link a named pet you are looking at to the AI system. /ai pet info [pet_name] вЂ” View detailed stats, mood, and bond for a pet. /ai pet nickname вЂ” Set a unique nickname for your linked pet. /ai pet inv [pet_name] вЂ” Open your pet's inventory. /ai pet inv allow вЂ” Grant inventory access to a friend. /ai pet inv disallow вЂ” Revoke inventory access. /ai pet share [allow] [relationship] вЂ” Create a 10-minute share link. /ai pet link list вЂ” View which of your pets are shared with others. /ai pet linked list вЂ” View pets owned by other players you are linked with. /ai pet unlink вЂ” Remove your connection to someone else's pet. ``` --- ### Permissions ``` nsr-ai.use вЂ” Allows players to use the /ai command. (Default: true) nsr-ai.admin вЂ” Allows players to use admin-specific AI commands. (Default: OP) nsr-ai.reload вЂ” Allows players to reload the plugin configuration. (Default: OP) nsr-ai.shop вЂ” Allows players to query shop prices. (Default: true) nsr-ai.pet вЂ” Allows players to interact with their pets. (Default: true) nsr-ai.aia вЂ” Allows players to manage AI addons via /aia. (Default: true) ``` ---
Example Configuration (`config.yml`) ```yaml # NSR-AI Configuration admin-activation-code: '' # Leave blank to auto-generate default-gemini-model: gemini-2.5-flash default-claude-model: claude-3-haiku-20240307 default-openai-model: gpt-4-mini default-api-provider: all # Set to 'all' for automatic provider detection. api-keys: - "YOUR_API_KEY_HERE" config-version: 2 ```
Example Configuration (`features.yml`) ```yaml # NSR-AI Feature Configuration # Custom colors for AI and user chat messages. # Use Minecraft color codes (e.g., &c for red, &a for green). chat-colors: ai: '&b' # Light blue for AI responses user: '&7' # Gray for user's chat messages # Messages displayed to players messages: ai-not-configured: '&cThe AI chat is not configured correctly. Please contact the server owner.' api-error: '&cAPI Error: Could not get a response from the AI. Please try again later.' permission-denied: '&cI don''t have permission to fulfill that request for you.' no-valid-keys: '&cThere are no valid API keys available. Please contact the server owner.' all-keys-rate-limited: '&cAll available API keys are currently rate-limited. Please try again later.' global-key-fail: - '&cThe server''s AI service is temporarily unavailable.' - '&cPlease try again in a few moments.' system-prompt: "You are a helpful AI assistant for a Minecraft server. Your answers should be concise and to the point. Prioritize answering questions about Minecraft. Do not provide code snippets or programming advice. If asked for code, respond with the configured message." # Auto Memory Refresh (Context Awareness) settings global-max-context-tokens: 5000 # Maximum tokens the AI can remember in context before auto-refresh auto-memory-refresh: # This will automatically run '/ai memory refresh' when the player's context reaches the limit. enabled: true limit: 20 # Threshold percentage (e.g., 20 means it refreshes when 20% context remains) chat-prefixes: ai: '&b[AI]' user: '&7[%player_name%]' admin-ai: '&c[AI]' # Code Blocker settings code-blocker: enabled: true message: "&cThis is a game built for fun and answering, not for coding." simple-knowledge-yml-approve: false command-toggles: data: true # Controls /ai data and /ai data all admin-disable: true # Controls /ai admin and /ai disable version: true # Controls /ai version and /ai v add-confirm: true # Controls /ai add and its confirmation remove-confirm: true # Controls /ai remove and its confirmation reload: true # Controls /ai reload memory-clear: true # Controls /ai memory clear command memory-refresh: true # Controls /ai memory refresh command cache-clear: true # Controls /ai cache clear command cache-refresh: true # Controls /ai cache refresh command # Cooldown settings for AI chat usage chat-cooldown: enabled: false # Set to true to enable a cooldown between /ai commands duration: 5000 # Cooldown duration in milliseconds (1000ms = 1 second) ```
Directory Tree ``` NSR-AI/ в”њв”Ђв”Ђ addons/ в”‚ в”њв”Ђв”Ђ addon1.jar в”‚ в””в”Ђв”Ђ addon1/ в”њв”Ђв”Ђ adminchathistory/ в”‚ в””в”Ђв”Ђ playername/ в”‚ в”њв”Ђв”Ђ chat-01-01-2026.log в”‚ в”њв”Ђв”Ђ chat-31-01-2026.log в”‚ в””в”Ђв”Ђ / в”‚ в””в”Ђв”Ђ checkpoint1.blackforge в”њв”Ђв”Ђ pets/ в”‚ в”њв”Ђв”Ђ playername/ в”‚ в”‚ в”њв”Ђв”Ђ chats.yml в”‚ в”‚ в””в”Ђв”Ђ data.yml в”‚ в””в”Ђв”Ђ reserved_nicknames.yml в”њв”Ђв”Ђ player_keys/ в”‚ в””в”Ђв”Ђ / в”‚ в”њв”Ђв”Ђ projectid.yml в”‚ в”њв”Ђв”Ђ master.key в”‚ в””в”Ђв”Ђ salt.bin в”њв”Ђв”Ђ playerchathistory/ в”‚ в””в”Ђв”Ђ playername/ в”‚ в”њв”Ђв”Ђ chat-18-01-2026.log в”‚ в”њв”Ђв”Ђ chat-31-01-2026.log в”‚ в””в”Ђв”Ђ / в”‚ в””в”Ђв”Ђ checkpoint1.blackforge в”њв”Ђв”Ђ security/ в”‚ в”њв”Ђв”Ђ bug.txt в”‚ в”њв”Ђв”Ђ master.key в”‚ в”њв”Ђв”Ђ master_secret.conf в”‚ в”њв”Ђв”Ђ security.jar в”‚ в””в”Ђв”Ђ server.salt в”њв”Ђв”Ђ summarychat/ в”‚ в””в”Ђв”Ђ playername/ в”‚ в””в”Ђв”Ђ summary.txt в”њв”Ђв”Ђ config.yml в”њв”Ђв”Ђ features.yml в”њв”Ђв”Ђ knowledge.yml в””в”Ђв”Ђ privacy.yml ```
